scope.target: Reconcile the manual commit with workflow state and correct post-commit validation findings.
scope.dependency_radius: Formatting-only changes to the new skill assets plus workflow status reconciliation.
constraints: Do not amend or force-push the already-published 3a11df7 commit.
Preserve the fact that the original automated commit attempt was blocked by the approval limit.
Record the manual commit as completed and close stale follow-up flags.
Do not remediate findings from the audit report.

inputs.architecture_target: A correctly closed workflow with accurate commit and validation evidence.
review_findings: Commit 3a11df7 was manually created and pushed after the approval-limit failure.
git diff HEAD^ HEAD --check found eight new blank lines at EOF.
The original commit omitted the workflow body required by policy.
user_constraints: Complete the follow-up handling and correctly close the previous task.
Explain where the initial analysis report is stored and how to read it.

steps: Normalize EOF whitespace in the eight affected files.
Replace stale commit-pending state with the actual manual commit evidence.
Record the original commit-body exception without rewriting published history.
Rerun validation and create a compliant follow-up commit.
validation: JSON parse for both task files

results.summary: Removed eight EOF whitespace defects, reconciled the manual commit with workflow state, recorded the original commit-body exception, and closed the workflow without rewriting published history.
tests_run: workflow task JSON parse: 2 files passed
canonical/Codex/Claude wrapper parity: 13/13/13 with zero differences
scope, code-review handoff, two-pass method, and report path reference search: passed
